name: Kimi CLI

form_factor.comment: CLI + VS Code + Zed + JetBrains via ACP, plus @moonshot-ai/kimi-agent-sdk (Node/Go/Python). Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-cli; Extension: https://www.kimi.com/help/kimi-code/vscode-getting-started; SDK: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-agent-sdk.

released_in.comment: First public release v0.34 on 2025-10-21. Reached v1.0 on 2026-01-27. Current latest release: v1.48.0 (2026-06-22).

latest_major_update.comment: Latest release v1.48.0 (June 22, 2026) fixes empty reasoning-content round trips, escalates repeated-tool-call reminders, force-stops dead-end streaks, and bumps kosong to 0.54.0.

rules.comment: Full AGENTS.md support. Hierarchical loading from git root to working dir, including .kimi/AGENTS.md at each level (32 KiB budget). /init command auto-generates AGENTS.md. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

skills.comment: Full Agent Skills format (SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter). Four-tier auto-discovery. Cross-compatible with Claude/Codex skill dirs. Flow skills with Mermaid/D2 flowcharts. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

hooks.comment: Supported (Beta). 13 lifecycle events: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, SessionEnd, SubagentStart/Stop, PreCompact, PostCompact, Notification. Shell commands via stdin.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP support. Transport: streamable HTTP, stdio, OAuth. kimi mcp add/list/test/remove/auth commands. Config in ~/.kimi/mcp.json. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

custom_commands.comment: Custom plugins (Beta) via plugin.json with executable scripts. Slash commands (/skill:, /flow:) serve as custom invocation. No arbitrary custom aliases in config. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

goal_command.comment: Kimi Code CLI docs cover core operations and plugins but not a `/goal` command.

subagents.comment: Full subagent support. Built-in types: coder, explore, plan. YAML agent files with inheritance. Agent tool with subagent_type, model, resume, run_in_background params.

model_selection.comment: Full model selection. Provider types: kimi, openai_legacy, openai_responses, anthropic, gemini, vertexai. /model interactive picker. CLI flags: --model, --thinking.

approval_mode.comment: Full system: Normal (approval with diff preview), YOLO mode (--yolo, auto-approves all), AFK mode (--afk, auto-approves and dismisses questions). Status bar badges.

sandbox_mode.comment: No dedicated sandbox/mode. Has workspace scope boundaries, file operation approval, sensitive file protection (.env, SSH keys). No containerized isolation.

resume.comment: Full session resume. --session/--resume/-S/-r with optional session ID. Interactive picker. Auto-restores approval decisions, plan mode, subagent instances.

continue.comment: kimi --continue/-C resumes most recent session in current working directory. /new for fresh session. /sessions lists and switches between sessions.

non_interactive.comment: --print flag for print mode: auto-exit after prompt, implicit auto-approval (AFK behavior), text stdout. --quiet shorthand. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=error, 75=retryable.

output_format.comment: --input-format: text or stream-json (JSONL). --output-format: text or stream-json (JSONL). --final-message-only flag. --quiet shorthand. Unified Message format for JSON I/O.

statusline.comment: Full status bar in shell mode: context usage %, mode indicators, YOLO/AFK badges, plan mode badge, background task counts, provider display name.

telemetry.comment: No explicit telemetry documentation found. Has automatic update checks (disable via KIMI_CLI_NO_AUTO_UPDATE), but no stated telemetry/analytics collection policy.

custom_model_provider.comment: Full custom provider support. providers table in config.toml with type, base_url, api_key, custom_headers. Six provider types including OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Gemini.

notes: Kimi CLI by Moonshot AI (Beijing) is an Apache-2.0 open-source coding agent with rapid development pace (97 releases in 7 months). Strong AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, subagent, and YOLO/AFK approval mode support. Notable for status bar with badges and comprehensive JSON streaming output.

pricing.comment: Kimi Code platform via membership subscription (credits-based, 7-day refresh cycle) or pay-as-you-go via api.moonshot.cn. Also supports own API key from OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini.

hosted_agent.comment: Local CLI tool backed by Moonshot API.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage was not found in public docs reviewed.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
